title: Rickshaw Run Schema
description: Schema for the internal runtime configuration document that rickshaw-run.py builds and uses to track the state of a benchmark run.  This document accumulates directory paths, benchmark parameters, registry configuration, run identity, execution parameters, and iteration data as the run progresses.

rickshaw-run.description: Metadata block containing the schema version for this runtime configuration format.

version.description: The schema version this document conforms to.

workshop-script.description: The filename of the workshop script used for building container images.

source-images-service-url.description: The URL of the source-images-service used for building engine container images.

base-run-dir.description: The base directory where run data, configuration, and results are stored.

bench-dir.description: The directory where benchmark subproject code is located.

bench-ids.description: A comma-separated list of benchmark:ID mappings extracted from the run file (e.g., 'uperf:1-2,fio:3').

bench-params.description: A comma-separated list of file paths containing expanded benchmark parameters for each benchmark.

benchmark.description: The benchmark name for single-benchmark runs, or a composite identifier for multi-benchmark runs.

dest-image-url.description: The destination URL where built engine container images are pushed to.

engine-dir.description: The directory where the engine scripts are located.

external-userenvs-dir.description: An optional directory containing userenv definitions from external sources, supplementing the built-in userenvs.

max-rb-attempts.description: The maximum number of roadblock barrier retry attempts before a synchronization failure is considered permanent.

max-sample-failures.description: The number of failed attempts tolerated before a sample is permanently marked as failed.

num-samples.description: The number of sample executions to run for each benchmark iteration.

packrat-dir.description: The directory where the packrat system information collector is located.

reg-auth.description: Legacy field: registry authentication token file path.

reg-host-port.description: Legacy field: registry host and port combination.

reg-tls-verify.description: Legacy field: registry TLS verification setting.

registries.description: Container registry configuration for private and public registries used for engine image storage.

private.description: Configuration for the private container registry, used for authenticated image push and pull operations.

public.description: Configuration for the public container registry, used for image push and pull operations that may not require authentication for pulls.

registries-json.description: The file path to the registries.json configuration file.

roadblock-dir.description: The directory where the roadblock synchronization project is located.

roadblock-password.description: The password used to authenticate with the Valkey instance for roadblock synchronization.

source-image-url.description: The source URL for pulling base container images used in engine image builds.

ssh-key-algorithm.description: The SSH key algorithm for the per-run engine key.

ssh-key-bits.description: The key size in bits for the per-run SSH key.

tool-group.description: An identifier grouping related tool configurations together.

tool-params.description: The file path to the tool parameters configuration file.

tools-dir.description: The directory where all tool subprojects are located.

workshop-dir.description: The directory where the workshop container build project is located.

bechmark.description: Legacy field with an intentional typo preserved for backwards compatibility.  Use 'benchmark' instead.

iterations.description: An array of iteration definitions, each containing a unique parameter combination to test.

items.description: An iteration definition with its UUID, numeric ID, and the parameter combination it represents.

iteration-uuid.description: A unique identifier for this iteration, used for CDM indexing.

id.description: The numeric iteration identifier within the run.

params.description: The benchmark parameters for this iteration.

items.description: A single benchmark parameter with its argument, value, and metadata.

param-uuid.description: A unique identifier for this parameter instance, used for CDM indexing.

id.description: The numeric parameter identifier within this iteration.

benchmark.description: The benchmark this parameter belongs to, used in multi-benchmark runs.

role.description: The engine role this parameter applies to.

endpoints.description: An array of endpoint definitions parsed from the run file or command line, identifying deployment targets for the run.

items.description: An endpoint definition with its type, configuration options, and display label.

opts.description: The endpoint configuration options as a serialized string.

label.description: A human-readable label for this endpoint, typically combining the type and a numeric index.

email.description: The email address of the user running the benchmark, used for result attribution.

name.description: The name of the user running the benchmark, used for result attribution.

run-uuid.description: A unique identifier for this run, used for CDM indexing and result tracking.

run-id.description: A human-readable run identifier, typically a timestamp-based directory name.

id.description: A short numeric identifier for the run.

tags.description: An array of user-defined metadata tags for identifying and filtering runs.

items.description: A tag consisting of a name-value pair.

test-order.description: The order in which iterations and samples are executed (e.g., 'sample', 'iteration', 'random').

run-file.description: The file path to the original run file that initiated this run.

registry-properties.description: Configuration properties for a container registry including authentication tokens, repository URL, TLS settings, and Quay-specific expiration management.

pull-token.description: The authentication token file path used for pulling images from this registry.

push-token.description: The authentication token file path used for pushing images to this registry.

quay-expiration-length.description: The duration for Quay image tag expiration (e.g., '13w' for 13 weeks).

quay-refresh-expiration-require-success.description: Whether a successful image push is required before refreshing the expiration timer.

quay-refresh-expiration-api-url.description: The Quay API URL used for refreshing image tag expirations.

quay-refresh-expiration-token-file.description: The file path containing the OAuth token used for Quay expiration API calls.

repo.description: The full repository URL for this registry (e.g., 'quay.io/org/repo').

tls-verify.description: Whether TLS certificate verification is enabled for this registry.

url-details.description: Decoded components of the repository URL, populated by rickshaw-run after parsing the repo URL.

dest-image-url.description: The fully qualified URL for pushing built images.

host.description: The registry hostname extracted from the repo URL.

host-port.description: The registry hostname and port combination.

label.description: The image label or tag component of the URL.

project.description: The project or namespace component of the URL.

protocol.description: The protocol prefix from the repo URL (e.g., 'https:/').

source-image-url.description: The fully qualified URL for pulling source images.
